VSCode extension API for agent memory
outreach.message: VSCode has 130k+ open Issues; no specific entry point identified. Best approach: write an extension that wraps the memory API
outreach.notes: Building a VSCode extension is more effective than posting in the tracker

outreach.message: All existing Issues are evaluation bugs; posting about memory would be off-topic

outreach.title: Agent reasoning cache on KV cache infra
outreach.message: vllm #43661 is about LLM inference KV caching, not agent task memory — not a good fit
